name: partysafe
description: Harm-reduction combo planner. Static, mobile-first, no tracking. Built on TripSit data (CC BY-NC-SA).

scripts.build: bun run validate && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.validate: bun run scripts/validate-mechanisms.ts --allow-unreviewed && bun run scripts/apply-overrides.ts && bun run scripts/lint-mechanisms.ts
scripts.validate:strict: bun run scripts/validate-mechanisms.ts && bun run scripts/apply-overrides.ts && bun run scripts/lint-mechanisms.ts
scripts.data:refresh: bun run scripts/fetch-tripsit.ts && bun run scripts/lean-tripsit.ts
